div.p: Compile Once - Run Everywhere (CO-RE) Enables portable eBPF programs by deferring field offset resolution to load-time via BTF.

g.title: Programmer uses CO-RE macros to access fields

div.p: Relocation allows the flags field to be found even if offset shifts (e.g. version diff).
If flags is missing in host kernel, libbpf aborts load to ensure safety.

g.title: Programmer uses CO-RE macros to access fields
